paragraph.font: Instructions to appear at top of all Signup Sheets:
check here to add,edit or delete signup sheets
Add as many other fields as you want to request from people signing up. Note: If you don't select Email Address, the signups will not receive email confirmation of their selection.
Indicate fields to be asked on signup sheet in addition to Player Name:
If you want to add a custom question for the signup sheet, enter it here:

string.value: Email and Re-enter Email Addresses do not match!

paragraph.font: Please select the sheet to edit or delete:
Which sheet do you wish to view?
Enter part or all of a Player's name or email address:

A Sheet Name is the name that distinguishes this sheet from other signup sheets. For example, if people are choosing tryout locations and times, an appropriate name might be: "Combs Field, Saturday, 1:30pm."
People looking at a list of Sheet Names should be able to see all the information they will need in order to select the correct sheet to sign up on.

string.value: Email and Re-enter Email Addresses do not match!

paragraph.font: Our records show you already signed up for:
What would you like to do?
Look for a specific person's name
Enter part of all of a Player's name or email address:

process.name: Pre-Signup
process.comment: - get setup parameters necessary for this Form
- calculate all the counts for all the sogn-up sheets
- see if there are any sheets that are not yet filled

string.value: Sorry, all available slots have been filled. Thank you!

paragraph.font: This email is just to confirm that you have signed up for
